post.summary: Creates an estimate for the workorder.
post.description:
### Work Order Validation: ###
- Will return an error if WorkOrder not found.
- Will return an error if the WorkOrder is past sales status.
- Will return an error if the WorkOrder has been cancelled.
            
### Price Validation on Estimate Line Item: ###
-  For SKUs that are natively priced in IME System, the quantity field should reflect the actual quantity of the SKU in question, and IME System will calculate the total price. Otherwise, the quantity field should reflect the actual retail price to the customer for the SKU in question.
            
### SKU Validation: ###
- Only certain SKUs will not require a location to be included in the payload. These are determined at program set-up.
- If the SKU is for a miscellaneous item, the UoM and Description fields are required.
- If the SKU is for a product or accessory, the SKU needs to be part of an EstimateLineItem that is associated with a Location.

post.summary: Creates a change order for the workorder.
post.description:
### Work Order Validation: ###
- Will return an error if WorkOrder not found.
- Will return an error if the WorkOrder is before sales status.
- Will return an error if the WorkOrder is at Completed-Paid status.
- Will return an error if the WorkOrder has been cancelled.
- Will return an error if the Sale Contract has not been signed.
            
### Price Validation on Estimate Line Item: ###
-  For SKUs that are natively priced in IME System, the quantity field should reflect the actual quantity of the SKU in question, and IME System will calculate the total price. Otherwise, the quantity field should reflect the actual retail price to the customer for the SKU in question.
            
### SKU Validation: ###
- Only certain SKUs will not require a location to be included in the payload. These are determined at program set-up.
- If the SKU is for a miscellaneous item, the UoM and Description fields are required.
- If the SKU is for a product or accessory, the SKU needs to be part of an EstimateLineItem that is associated with a Location.

get.summary: Retrieves an estimate by its unique id.

403.description: You are not authorized to access this estimate.

404.description: Estimate with given id does not exist.

get.summary: Gets a payment URL for an estimate.
get.description:
Making a successful payment on the estimate is going to mark the estimate as primary and move the Work Order associated with this
estimate to Sale.
            
This request will fail if:
- The estimateId was not found.
- If the Work Order was paid for in total.
- If the Estimate with given estimateId is not a primary estimate and the Work Order is past sale.

post.summary: Move the estimate to Sale Pending status
post.description:
This endpoint always moves the work order to Sale Pending. 
Sometimes, for example, if a work order has no deposit requirements, it will also result in the work order moving to Sale.
 
This request will fail if:
- The estimateId was not found.
- If the estimate has not been sent yet.
- If the Work Order is not in 'Appointment Run' or 'Sit no Sale' status.

post.summary: Clones an existing estimate.
post.description:
The request will fail if:
- The estimateId was not found.
- The work order is past-sale (valid statuses: Appt Set, Appt Run, Closed Pending, Sit No Sale Pending, Sale Pending).

requestBody.description: Model payload with cloned estimate name and quote number

get.summary: Internal/external accessible endpoint

put.description:
Will return error if:
- The lead contact does not exist
- The request is not valid

parameters.name: ReturnContent
parameters.description: When this is true request should return 200 OK and body, when is false should return 204

requestBody.description:
Request model containing FirstName, LastName, CellPhone, HomePhone, WorkPhone, Email and PreferredLanguage.
PreferredLanguage it's a language code (complies with ISO 639-1 alpha-2) with country code (ISO 3166-1 alfa-2) if relevant.

403.description: You are not authorized to access this workorder.

post.summary: Creates an estimation appointment for a given workorder.
post.description:
Will return error if:
- An Estimation Appointment already exists for given workorder.
- The workorder is not in Appointment Pending or Lead status.
- The time/date of the workorder is more than 24 hours before the current UTC time.

parameters.name: ReturnContent
parameters.description: When this is true request should return 200 OK and body, when is false should return 204

requestBody.description: The date and time (in the API consumer's timezone) for an estimation appointment.

put.summary: Updates an estimation appointment for a given workorder.
put.description:
Will return error if:
- No Estimation Appointment exists for given workorder.
- The workorder is not in Appointment Pending, Appointment Set or Lead status.
- The time/date of the workorder is more than 24 hours before the current UTC time.

requestBody.description: The date and time (in the API consumer's timezone) for an estimation appointment.

delete.summary: Cancels an estimation appointment for a given workorder.
delete.description:
Will return error if:
- Work order does not exist or access is forbidden
- No Estimation Appointment exists for given work order.
- Work order is at Appt Run status or later

post.summary: Creates an installation appointment for a given workorder.
post.description:
Will return error if:
- An Installation Appointment already exists for given workorder.
- The workorder is not past Sale Status.
- The workorder is at Completed Status.
- The time/date of the workorder is more than 24 hours before the current UTC time.

requestBody.description: The date and time (in the API consumer's timezone) for an estimation appointment.

put.summary: Updates an installation appointment for a given workorder.
put.description:
Will return error if:
- No Installation Appointment exists for given workorder.
- The workorder is not past Sale Status.
- The workorder is at Completed Status.
- The time/date of the workorder is more than 24 hours before the current UTC time.

requestBody.description: The date and time (in the API consumer's timezone) for an estimation appointment.

post.summary: Accepts 3 available time slots for requested appointments from the customer.
post.description:
Will return error if:
- The Work Order with the given id is not found
- The Work Order is in ApptSet or later status
- Requested appointment dates are already set

requestBody.description: Request model containing at least 1, up to 3 requested dates.

post.summary: Creates a measurement appointment for a given workorder.
post.description:
Will return error if:
- A Measurement Appointment already exists for given workorder.
- The workorder is not in Sale status.

requestBody.description: The date and time (in the API consumer's timezone) for a measurement appointment.

put.summary: Updates a measurement appointment for a given workorder.
put.description:
Will return error if:
- No Measurement Appointment exists for given workorder.
- The workorder is not in Measurement Appointment Set status.

requestBody.description: The date and time (in the API consumer's timezone) for a measurement appointment.
